A demokraták mellett viszont a republikánus politikusok sem ugrálnak örömükben. Van, aki szerint ez az elmúlt évtizedek legrosszabb külpolitikai fiaskója.

HVG.title: Voltak, akik beleroppantak a pornózásba, a Birodalomban mégis Kovi marad a hős
HVG.summary: Az RTL+ legújabb produkciója, a Birodalom arra vállalkozik, hogy bemutassa a magyar pornóipar 90-es évekbeli felfutását, mindenekelőtt az emberi sorsokra koncentrálva. Bár az évadot Kovács István, azaz Kovi figurája fogja össze, a történet nem kizárólag róla szól: az egyes epizódok a korszak egy-egy ismert pornósztárjának sorsát járják körbe, de az alkotók közben nem tudnak túllépni azon, hogy a női testet ne elsősorban látványosságként kezeljék. A Birodalom nem hajlandó szembenézni azzal, amit megmutat.

Nature.title: Daily briefing: The proteins that protect us from deadly mutations

Nature.title: The brain region that could provide a cognitive ‘reservoir’ in old age

Nature.title: DNA from hunter-gatherer teeth reveals secrets of ancient plague
Nature.summary:
Nature, Published online: 17 June 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-01941-7

Analysis shows evidence of deadly outbreaks 5,500 years ago — plus, a prototype dark-matter detector.

Nature.title: Emergent decadal predictability in Antarctic contribution to sea-level rise
Nature.summary:
Nature, Published online: 17 June 2026; doi:10.1038/s41586-026-10614-4

Although Antarctic ice loss projections diverge widely by 2100, this Perspective shows that present-day rates robustly predict mid-century sea level rise, providing a firm basis for near-term planning, while highlighting priorities for model development aimed at resolving longer-term sea level rise uncertainty.

Nature.title: A distant brown dwarf coplanar to a warm Jupiter and a hot super-Earth
Nature.summary:
Nature, Published online: 17 June 2026; doi:10.1038/s41586-026-10586-5

Analysis of long-term radial velocity data and transit time variations, induced by a super-Earth, a warm Jupiter and a brown dwarf in a coplanar orbit around the relatively young star TOI201.

Nature.title: Probing picometre-scale interlayer deformations via hyperbolic polaritons
Nature.summary:
Nature, Published online: 17 June 2026; doi:10.1038/s41586-026-10638-w

A new polaritonic optical method that uses the mid-infrared out-of-plane hyperbolic polaritons mode is described and experimentally validated to allow the examination of picometre-scale interlayer deformations, providing a bridge between nanomechanics and photonics.

Nature.title: Optical fibre gripper for high-performance 3D micromanipulation
Nature.summary:
Nature, Published online: 17 June 2026; doi:10.1038/s41586-026-10673-7

A miniature three-dimensional optical fibre gripper enables powerful, precise micromanipulation of particles and single cells in confined spaces, bridging the gap between optical and mechanical tweezers.

Nature.title: A prototype differential atom interferometer for fundamental physics
Nature.summary:
Nature, Published online: 17 June 2026; doi:10.1038/s41586-026-10617-1

A prototype differential atom interferometer operates at the standard quantum limit with no excess noise beyond atom shot noise, achieving performance in line with the specifications for future long-baseline atom interferometers.
